subject: Zweilous, a two-headed dark dragon Pokemon with a brown and blue body, both heads open-mouthed and aggressive, crashing through tall grass in a meadow
description: A large two-headed dragon-like creature bursts through dense tall grass in a sunlit outdoor meadow. Both heads are raised and wide open, mouths gaping to expose pink interiors, conveying intense aggression and rivalry. The body is stocky and covered in dark brown and blue-grey coloring with small wing-like appendages. Green hills and a bright sky form the background. The composition captures the creature mid-lunge, with grass flying around it. The dual-head design is the unmistakable visual anchor, with each head oriented slightly differently, consistent with the flavor text about competing heads.
foreground: two-headed dragon creature lunging through tall grass
background: green meadow with rolling hills and bright sky
